channel.title: smit
channel.description: Smit: software, robotics, Linux, and current setup.

item.title: Checking out Tangled
item.description: My first impressions of tangled.org, the decentralized git forge

item.title: Why I Switched From Neovim to Zed
item.description: Why I moved away from Neovim and why Zed feels like a better fit for my workflow.

item.title: Codex Is Awesome
item.description: My experience with OpenAI's coding agent, Codex

item.title: My Coding Setup
item.description: My current programming setup for simplicity and efficiency

item.title: The Making of LQF
item.description: An overview of the design philosophy and development process behind LQF, my custom configuration language, including the reasoning, structure, and syntax decisions that shape how it works.
